nasb.text: and on the borders which were between the frames were lions, oxen and cherubim; and on the frames there was a pedestal above, and beneath the lions and oxen were wreaths of hanging work.

esv.text: and on the panels that were set in the frames were lions, oxen, and cherubim. On the frames, both above and below the lions and oxen, there were wreaths of beveled work.

cnv.text: 在盆架間的各邊上，有獅子、牛和基路伯。盆架上有座，獅子和牛的上下都有花紋的浮雕。

ccb.text: 镶板和框架上刻着狮子、牛和基路伯天使，狮子和牛的上面和下面雕刻着花环。
